group.not_owner: You are not the owner of this group.
group.group_deleted_by_owner: The group {group_name} has been disbanded by the owner.
group.group_deleted_notification: Your group {group_name} has been disbanded by the owner.
group.invalid_name: Invalid group name. Must be 1-16 characters.
group.no_group_to_invite_from: You must be in a group to invite players.
group.not_owner_invite: Only the group owner can invite players.
group.invited: You have been invited to join the group: {group_name}. Use /groupchat accept {group_name} to join.
group.no_invite_or_not_exists: You have not been invited to this group, or it no longer exists.
group.not_invited: You have not been invited to this group.
group.no_group_to_leave: You are not in a group to leave.
group.new_owner_notification: You are now the owner of the group.
group.must_be_in_group_to_toggle: You must be in a group to toggle group chat.
group.no_group_to_send_message: You are not in a group to send a message to.
group.no_group_to_info: You are not in any group. Use /groupchat info <group_name> to view specific group info.
group.not_in_group_or_not_exists: You are not in this group or it does not exist.
group.chat_enabled: Group chat enabled. Your messages will now only go to your group.
group.chat_disabled: Group chat disabled. Your messages will go to public chat.
group.join_request_sent: Join request sent to group owner.
group.join_request_received: {player_name} has requested to join your group {group_name}. Use /groupchat acceptreq {player_name} or /groupchat denyreq {player_name}
group.no_group_to_manage_requests: You must be in a group to manage join requests.
group.request_player_offline: The requested player is not online.
group.no_pending_request: No pending request found from this player.
group.request_accepted_owner: You have accepted the join request.
group.request_accepted_player: Your request to join the group has been accepted!
group.request_denied_owner: You have denied the join request.
group.request_denied_player: Your request to join the group has been denied.
group.help_invite: Invite a player to your group.
group.help_join: Join an existing group (if you have an invitation).
group.help_accept: Accept an invitation to join a group.
group.help_deny: Deny an invitation to join a group.
group.help_request: Request to join an existing group.
group.help_acceptreq: Accept a join request (group owners only).
group.help_denyreq: Deny a join request (group owners only).
group.help_requests: List pending join requests (group owners only).
group.help_say: Send a message to the group.
group.help_toggle: Toggle group chat on or off.
group.hover_accept_request: Click to accept the join request
group.hover_deny_request: Click to deny the join request
group.kick_not_member: That player is not in your group.
group.kick_cannot_self: You can't kick yourself. Use /groupchat leave.
group.cancel_request_none: You do not have a pending request to that group.
group.cancel_request_success: Your join request to {group_name} has been cancelled.
group.invite_rate_limit: Please wait {seconds}s before sending another invite.

manage.user_invalid: Player must be online name or UUID.
manage.user_remove_fail: Could not remove group {group} from player.
manage.duration_invalid: Invalid duration. Use days/weeks/months with amount > 0.
manage.user_perm_add_fail: Could not add permission {permission} to player.
manage.user_perm_remove_fail: Could not remove permission {permission} from player.

mention.too_frequent_mention_everyone: You are mentioning everyone too frequently. Please wait a while.
mention.no_permission_everyone: You do not have permission to mention everyone.
mention.too_frequent_mention_player: You are mentioning players too frequently. Please wait a while.
mention.no_permission_player: You do not have permission to mention players.

pm.no_reply_target: No recent conversation to reply to.
pm.reply_target_offline: Your last conversation partner is no longer online.
pm.error_send: Could not send your message. Please try again later.

home.location_unavailable: Unable to read your location right now.
home.homes_empty: You do not have any homes yet.
home.back_teleported: Teleported back to your previous location.
home.limit_reached: You have reached your home limit ({limit}).
home.error_save: Could not save your home. Please try again later.
home.error_load: Could not load your home data. Please try again later.
home.error_delete: Could not delete your home. Please try again later.

tpa.request_received_tpa: {player} wants to teleport to you. Use /tpaccept or /tpdeny.
tpa.request_received_tpahere: {player} wants you to teleport to them. Use /tpaccept or /tpdeny.
tpa.no_pending_request: You have no pending teleport requests.
tpa.requester_offline: That request is no longer valid because requester is offline.
tpa.no_outgoing_request: You have no outgoing teleport request.
tpa.error_request: Could not process the teleport request. Please try again later.

warp.location_unavailable: Unable to read your location right now.
warp.no_permission: You do not have permission to use warp {warp}.
warp.error_save: Could not save the warp. Please try again later.
warp.error_load: Could not load warp data. Please try again later.
warp.error_delete: Could not delete the warp. Please try again later.

spawn.not_set: Spawn is not set yet. Use /setspawn.
spawn.location_unavailable: Unable to read your current location.
spawn.error_load: Could not load spawn. Please try again later.
spawn.error_save: Could not save spawn. Please try again later.

seen.need_uuid: Player is offline. Use UUID for exact lookup.
seen.unknown: No seen data for that player.
seen.error_load: Could not load seen data. Please try again later.

ignore.error_save: Could not update ignore list. Please try again later.

utility.heal_fail: Could not restore full HP for {player}.
utility.no_permission_others: You do not have permission to affect other players.

command_toggle.protected: Command {command} is protected and cannot be disabled.

error.provider_unavailable: Storage is currently unavailable. Please try again later.
error.operation_failed: Storage operation failed. Please try again later.

error.driver_load_failed: Runtime JDBC driver failed to load.
error.offline_missing: Runtime library is missing and downloads are disabled.
error.insecure_repository: Runtime library repository must use HTTPS.

admin.player_only: This command can only be used by a player.
admin.no_permission_others: You do not have permission to affect other players.
admin.error_state: Could not update admin state. Please try again later.
admin.top_fail: Could not find top block at your position.

moderation.error_save: Could not save moderation data. Please try again later.
moderation.error_load: Could not load moderation data. Please try again later.
moderation.jail_not_set: Jail location is not set. Use /setjail first.
